merriment-social.name: Merriment Social
merriment-social.notes: Strong event/group dining reviews. One 3★ mentioning value concerns and surcharge. Majority 4-5★.

third-coast.name: Third Coast Provisions

low_star_reviews.author: Korinne Mack
low_star_reviews.issue: Solo diner ignored by bartender for 45 min; food too salty
low_star_reviews.note: Previously seen in last run — no new alert needed

third-coast.notes: One 2★ solo diner service complaint (known). Mixed on saltiness of food. Overall strong atmosphere and cocktail praise.

flourchild.name: Flourchild Pizza

low_star_reviews.author: Jim Whitaker
low_star_reviews.issue: Pizza crust described as dry/stale, sauce bland
low_star_reviews.note: Previously seen in last run — no new alert needed

flourchild.notes: One 2★ pizza quality complaint (known). Strong praise for atmosphere, drinks, apps, and specific pizzas like King Cheese.

loon-room.name: The Loon Room
loon-room.notes: Excellent cocktail program reviews. One 4★ with minor charcuterie feedback on Valentine's Day special. Overall very strong.
